Bash(node -e "const data=require\('./public/data/routes.json'\); const routes=data.busRoutes||data.routes||data; const inSvc=routes.filter\(r=>{const n=21*60+32;const s=r.serviceHoursStart*60;let e=r.serviceHoursEnd*60+60;if\(e<=s\)e+=1440;return \(n>=s&&n<e\)||\(n+1440>=s&&n+1440<e\)}\); const outSvc=routes.filter\(r=>!inSvc.includes\(r\)\); console.log\('Total routes:',routes.length\); console.log\('In service at 21:32 \(+60min tail\):',inSvc.length\); console.log\('Out of service:',outSvc.length\); console.log\('\\nSample OUT-OF-SERVICE routes:'\); outSvc.slice\(0,15\).forEach\(r=>console.log\(' ',r.id,r.name||r.nameCn||'',r.serviceHoursStart+'h-'+r.serviceHoursEnd+'h'\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const routes=require\('./public/data/bus-routes.json'\); const n=21*60+32; const check=r=>{const s=r.serviceHoursStart*60;let e=r.serviceHoursEnd*60+60;if\(e<=s\)e+=1440;return \(n>=s&&n<e\)||\(n+1440>=s&&n+1440<e\)}; const inSvc=routes.filter\(check\); const outSvc=routes.filter\(r=>!check\(r\)\); console.log\('Total:',routes.length,' In-svc \(21:32\):',inSvc.length,' Out:',outSvc.length\); console.log\('\\\\nOut-of-service routes:'\); outSvc.forEach\(r=>console.log\(' ',r.id,\(r.name||r.nameCn||''\).slice\(0,30\),r.serviceHoursStart+'h-'+r.serviceHoursEnd+'h'\)\);")
